name: workflow-toolkit
description: Universal Claude Code workflow skills + reliability enforcement: anti-bloat guard on instruction files, per-turn hard-rule re-injection, independent verifier subagent, plus project bootstrap, machine bootstrap, project hygiene audit (2-layer: deterministic linter + judgement agent), skill usage audit (adoption, trigger fidelity, dead-skill triage on session transcripts), session retro, design system lookup, browser verification, claude.ai Artifact prototyping (CSP transform, base64-safe embed, Figma asset extraction), pre-deploy verification, coding principles, second-opinion advisor, structured divergent ideation (isolated frames → adversarial critic → deepen), handoff, memory discipline, web research, Linear ticket drafts. Works across any project type.
